scripts.build: npm --workspace api-gateway run build && npm --workspace user-service run build && npm --workspace goals-service run build && npm --workspace analytics-service run build && npm --workspace gamification-service run build
scripts.prisma:generate: npm --workspace user-service run prisma:generate && npm --workspace goals-service run prisma:generate && npm --workspace analytics-service run prisma:generate && npm --workspace gamification-service run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:push: npm --workspace user-service run prisma:push && npm --workspace goals-service run prisma:push && npm --workspace analytics-service run prisma:push && npm --workspace gamification-service run prisma:push
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:user && npm run seed:goals && npm run seed:analytics && npm run seed:gamification
